image_headline: 3 MYTHS KEEPING YOU OFF THE SCHEDULE
image_prompt: Carousel cover slide design. Dark navy background. Bold ALL CAPS headline top: '3 MYTHS KEEPING YOU OFF THE SCHEDULE'. Center: illustrated professional woman in blazer holding a checklist, looking up with an expression of realization. Three floating card stubs below labeled 'MYTH 1', 'MYTH 2', 'MYTH 3' each with a bold red X icon. Lower right coral accent stripe. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.

cover.headline_html: 3 myths that stop small businesses cold.

myths.label: The Past Performance Lie
myths.myth_text: You need federal contracts before GSA will approve you.
myths.reality_text: GSA only looks at your commercial track record. Three years of commercial revenue and solid references is enough to qualify. Federal history is not a requirement.

myths.label: The Auto-Discovery Myth
myths.myth_text: Once you're on the Schedule, agencies will find you.
myths.reality_text: The Schedule is a vehicle, not a marketplace. It gives agencies a fast way to buy from you — but you still have to find them. Active outreach wins contracts. Waiting doesn't.

myths.label: The Easy Application Fantasy
myths.myth_text: Any prepared company can just fill out the application and get approved.
myths.reality_text: GSA rejects roughly half of first-time applicants. Pricing errors, wrong NAICS codes, and incomplete documents are the three biggest culprits. Most self-filed attempts stall or get withdrawn.

close.close_question: Drop the belief you had to unlearn before you could move forward in GovCon.
